sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational fixed-point cosine coefficient lookup for DCT and transposed IDCT matrices.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_round_clip: Combinational Q14 rounding and signed output saturation.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_matrix_core: Combinational 8-point matrix row evaluator that composes coefficient ROM, MAC, and rounding.
